title: corybas nanus
intro: Corybas nanus, also known as the terrestrial orchid or corybas, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Corybas nanus has been used in herbal medicine, primarily for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Corybas nanus is often prepared as a decoction, infusing the dried plant material in hot water, or as a tincture, extracting the active compounds using a solvent.
